data.title: Brands offer deals & debut new vegan menu items for Veganuary, with growing number of pledges. Los Angeles, Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: In response to the increasing amount of individuals taking the January vegan pledge, both national and regional brands are providing discounted rates on well-liked products and introducing fresh vegan menu items. This initiative comes as no surprise considering the escalating numbers of Veganuary participants. The event, observed annually in January, encourages people to adopt a vegan lifestyle for the month. This year alone, the campaign has attracted a record-breaking number of individuals, with over [specific number] people committing to go vegan for the month. The surge in participants has motivated businesses in the food industry to cater to this expanding market by offering special deals on popular vegan items and showcasing innovative plant-based menu options. The movement, spearheaded by the global non-profit organization Veganuary, has gained significant traction and is driving notable changes in consumer choices and industry offerings. Los Angeles witnessed a particularly evident impact of this trend, with numerous establishments rolling out promotions and new vegan selections to meet the demand of consumers partaking in the January pledge.

data.title: Nasdaq drops by over 100 points, Bank of America reports upbeat earnings. Dow down by 0.21% at 49,090.31, Nasdaq at 23,551.77 down by 0.67%, S&P 500 at 6,931.31 down by 0.47%. Bank of America reports $7.6 billion net income, surpassing EPS and revenue estimates.
data.description: U.S. stocks saw a decline this morning, with the Nasdaq Composite dropping over 100 points. The Dow was down 0.21% at 49,090.31, the Nasdaq fell 0.67% to 23,551.77, and the S&P 500 dropped 0.47% to 6,931.31. Energy sector shares rose by 0.9%, while consumer discretionary stocks decreased by 0.9%. Bank of America Corp reported Q4 fiscal 2025 results with a net income of $7.6 billion and EPS of 98 cents, beating estimates. Revenue was up 7% Y/Y at $28.532 billion. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Supreme Court decision on tariffs could add to $2 trillion budget deficit, worrying stocks and bonds.
data.description: The decision to nullify the tariffs is projected to contribute to the budget deficit, which currently exceeds $2 trillion. Market participants are closely monitoring the Supreme Court's ruling on tariffs, with stocks and bonds preparing for the outcome in real-time coverage provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Bank of America and Wells Fargo shares slip as Citi's rises on Bank Earnings Day 2. Mixed results reported.
data.description: Three major banks, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, and Citi, released their earnings reports on the second day of the earnings season. Following the mixed results, the stock prices of these banks witnessed a decline. Bank of America and Wells Fargo shares slipped, while Citi's shares saw a positive surge. This volatility in the market was observed on a busy day for banking sector earnings.

data.title: HealthTab™ to expand to 70 more pharmacy sites in North East London, building on NHS partnership success.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 14, 2026, AVRICORE HEALTH INC. (TSXV: AVCR) disclosed plans to expand its HealthTab™ platform in North East London (NEL). The company, also known as Avricore, intends to deploy the platform in 70 more community pharmacy sites, following the achievements of its cardiovascular programs associated with the NHS in partnership with Barts Health NHS Trust.

data.title: ChangeUp releases new book, "The Brand Vortex" by co-founder Bill Chidley, offering new brand strategy approach. Jan. 14, 2026.
data.description: Utilizing insights from behavioral science and practical brand application, a new brand strategy method is being introduced. In Dayton, Ohio on January 14, 2026, ChangeUp, a prominent retail design and brand strategy firm, revealed the launch of The Brand Vortex: The Guide to Branding. This publication offers a fresh perspective on brand strategy, combining expertise in consumer behavior and extensive brand knowledge to provide valuable insights.

data.title: Virtu Financial to report Q4 results on Jan 29, 2026. Leading provider of financial services. #NYSE:VIRT
data.description: Virtu Financial, Inc. (NYSE:VIRT), a prominent provider of global financial services offering liquidity and transparent products throughout the investment cycle, is set to release its Q4 2025 results on January 29, 2026, before the US market opens. This information was shared on January 14, 2026.

data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. expands with 4 new sites and doubled capacity in India; 50% dedicated to packaging in Asia.
data.description: China and India have recently launched four new paper and packaging satellites, with an additional site in India seeing its capacity doubled. These expansions have been significant, with 50% of the growth focused on packaging applications. This move highlights the growing demand for paper and packaging solutions in these regions, showcasing a commitment to meet the needs of consumers and industries.

data.title: INJ to hit $6.20 in Feb with short-term target at $5.80-$6.03 & medium-term forecast $5.80-$6.50. Breakout level at $6.03, support at $5.35.
data.description: The forecast for INJ prices indicates a short-term target of $5.80 to $6.03 within a week, while the medium-term prediction for the next month is in the range of $5.80 to $6.50. The bullish breakout level is set at $6.03, while the critical support level stands at $5.35.

data.title: Honeywell stock rises post-Quantinuum IPO filing; Quantum unit to submit draft to SEC, no share count disclosed.
data.description: Honeywell International Inc. saw a rise in its stock on Wednesday following reports that its majority-owned quantum subsidiary, Quantinuum LLC, is progressing towards a potential public offering. The company also announced a new AI retail initiative in collaboration with Google Cloud. Honeywell's aerospace and automation division revealed that Quantinuum intends to confidentially submit draft IPO documents to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Although specific details such as the share count and expected price range have not been disclosed by Honeywell, Quantinuum plans to file a draft registration statement for the IPO. The company highlighted that the timing of the offering will be contingent upon market conditions. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: HNTB Corporation announces key leadership changes to enhance collaboration and value delivered to clients.
data.description: HNTB Corporation has recently expanded, with significant changes being implemented to bolster cooperation and improve the services provided to clients. On January 14, 2026, in Kansas City, Missouri, the company unveiled multiple leadership adjustments aimed at enhancing cross-functional collaboration to better serve clients. These changes are expected to enhance the overall value delivered to clients, solidifying HNTB's position as a leading provider in the industry.

data.title: Jeff Wyler Automotive Family buys Midwest Auto Group, creating The Wyler Collection. JWAF now one of the largest auto groups in the US.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on January 14, 2026, the Jeff Wyler Automotive Family (JWAF), a leading privately owned automotive group in the US, disclosed the purchase of Midwest Auto Group (MAG), marking a notable advancement in JWAF's expansion plans. This acquisition positions JWAF as a key player in the industry, consolidating its position within the market. The deal underscores JWAF's commitment to increasing its presence and influence in the automotive sector.
